title: 🖼️ Continuous Long Image Exports are Here! 🚀
message: We have expanded our export engine! You can now choose to save your captured web pages as a single, high-quality, continuous long image (PNG), in addition to our standard PDF document format.
points: 🖼️ Long Image Export: Select 'Long Image' in the export menu to stitch your captured segments into one seamless, continuous PNG file.
⚡ Proportional Stitching Engine: Our new image-stitching algorithm ensures that your content scales perfectly across the entire long-image canvas, matching the desktop quality of our PDF engine.
🌐 Desktop Viewport Optimization: Updated viewport rendering logic ensures that websites (like YouTube) maintain their full desktop layout during capture, eliminating element squishing.

🛠️ Enhanced Sticky Element Handling: Advanced scroll-synchronization now automatically hides sticky headers during segment capture to prevent content duplication, ensuring your exports look professional.
✨ Bottom Sheet Selection: Export format options (PDF vs. Long Image) are now presented via a sleek, interactive bottom sheet for a more intuitive user experience.

title: 🛠️ Live HTML Inspector & Sandbox Playground! 🚀
message: We have engineered an advanced live developer toolkit! You can now isolate, inspect, alter, and copy visual webpage component source codes and styles directly inside the live emulated rendering frame.
points: ✨ Live Inspector Selection: Tap any element inside the interactive preview laptop canvas to automatically catch its node tag name, target string segments, and layout styles.
⌨️ Scrollable Sandbox Playground: Easily change class code strings or override properties inside a dedicated code input window that handles sizing effortlessly when the system keyboard opens up.
🎨 Real-Time Layout Overrides: Hit apply on your custom payload edits to watch the live layout view switch parameters and paint your markup changes immediately.
📋 Full Website Source Exporter: Stream complete full-page markup onto safe cache pathways to duplicate and extract entire HTML documents onto your clipboard with zero thread lag.
👑 Premium Dashboard Visibility: Premium status indicators and Lifetime PRO flash offers are now mirrored dynamically inside your Multi-Page convert screen.

title: ⚡ Multi-URL Workspace is Live! 🚀
message: We have engineered a powerful new batch environment! You can now compile, arrange, and stitch multiple websites simultaneously into a flawless continuous master document with full premium plan control.
points: 🔗 Multi-URL Workspace Builder: Group multiple websites or custom raw HTML codes side-by-side into a unified project list. (Free Tier: Max 3 items | PRO Tier: UNLIMITED sites!)
📜 Continuous Canvas Rendering: Combines all configured workspace snapshots sequentially into a single continuous scrolling output, completely eliminating broken page margins and padding gaps.
🤚 Drag-and-Drop Sequence Arranger: Seamlessly reorder the conversion hierarchy of your web links on the fly using responsive row dragging gestures.
🗂️ Smart Vault Batch Storage: Saves your entire active workspace list as a structured entry in your history database so you can re-open the entire batch with one tap.
👑 Premium Freedom Unlock: Upgrading to PRO permanently removes the 3-site workspace restriction, unlocks unlimited daily workspace operations, and wipes out all processing interstitial ads entirely.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest Web to PDF tools and features.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly when you open the app.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood rendering tweaks for even faster HTML and URL to PDF conversions.
